sections.paragraph:
καταναθεματίζω (s. prec. entry; Just., D. 47) curse Mt 26:74 v.l. (s. καταθεματίζω).

prec. prec. = preceding

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 522
